message:
feat(cli): ID resolution refactoring, search regex optimization, update/audit improvements

- create.rs: introduce ResolverConfig abstraction replacing the ambiguous
  boolean parameter in IdResolver::new(), making the API self-documenting
  and extensible for future config options (hash algorithms, validation rules)
- search.rs: replace naive case-insensitive substring search (.to_lowercase()
  + .contains()) with pre-compiled Regex objects via RegexBuilder, eliminating
  per-iteration string allocations and reducing filtering from O(n·m) to O(n)
- update.rs: fix closed_at timestamp logic to properly clear the timestamp
  for ALL non-terminal statuses (Open, InProgress, Blocked, etc.) instead of
  only Open/InProgress; add test case for Blocked status verification
- audit.rs: add file.sync_all() after writing audit log entries to ensure
  durable writes that survive OS crashes, critical for append-only audit logs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
